title: Military Donations/Relief Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Military Donations/Relief Programs 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OPERATION RAMP IT UP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and helps install wheelchair ramps. Also accepts donations of used aluminum wheelchair ramps. Financial donations are accepted to fund future projects and can be given in memory or honor of someone. 5299 Aspen Valley Drive Liberty Township, OH 45011 Eligibility: Military veterans or spouses of veterans who are confined to a wheelchair due to disability and have exhausted all other resources Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers advocacy, support, and connection by providing space for camaraderie and conversation, a thrift store, military merchandise sales, treat boxes, quilts, cookies for troops, disposal and retirement of old flags, visitation to veterans who are housebound or in nursing homes, and opportunities to amplify veteran voices and stories. 180 W Idaho Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Veterans, service members, and their families. Volunteering and support is unrestricted. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 889-1978 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS
